description_long: This modern bungalow features a clean, rectilinear design with a mix of white and natural wood exterior finishes. Large, floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the facade and side elevations, allowing for abundant natural light and a strong indoor-outdoor connection. The structure includes a spacious wooden deck area, a fenced-in backyard with a swimming pool, and landscaped greenery along the perimeter. The roof is flat, with some sections serving as open terraces or balconies. The main entrance is accentuated by a wooden porch, and the overall layout is open and expansive, with clear zoning between living and recreational spaces. The architectural style is minimalist, emphasizing horizontal lines and functional outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, wood and white finishes, a pool, and spacious decks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden porch, and large windows with a clear view of the pool area to the left.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the upper terrace, extensive glazing, and the transition from indoor to outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the fenced backyard, swimming pool, and the wood-clad exterior walls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the landscaped area, pool, and the integration of green space with the deck.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glazing
